verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.183-186. All 11 verses verified, 0 gaps.

claims.claim: General introduction to 11th house effects (no predictive content)
11th lord in 11th or angle/trine -> many gains; even combust but exalted -> abundant gains
11th lord in 2nd + 2nd lord in angle + Jupiter -> gains will be great
11th lord in 3rd + 11th occupied by benefic -> 2000 Nishkas at 36th year
11th lord conjunct benefic in angle/trine -> 500 Nishkas at 40th year
Jupiter in 11th + Moon in 2nd + Venus in 9th -> 6000 Nishkas
Jupiter + Mercury + Moon in 11th -> wealth, grains, fortunes, diamonds, ornaments
11th lord in ascendant + ascendant lord in 11th (exchange) -> 1000 Nishkas at 33rd year
11th lord in 2nd + 2nd lord in 11th (exchange) -> abundant fortunes after marriage
11th lord in 3rd + 3rd lord in 11th (exchange) -> wealth through co-born, excellent ornaments
11th lord in fall/combustion or 6/8/12 with malefic -> no gains despite efforts
